categories.name: Acts and Early Christianity
categories.description: Posts on Acts, its historicity, early Christian communities, conversion, evangelism, miracles in Acts, Paul in Acts, and the rise of Christianity.

categories.name: Afterlife
categories.description: Posts on afterlife beliefs, heaven, hell, purgatory, eternal punishment, Sheol and Hades, resurrection of the dead, and afterlife journeys.

categories.name: Ancient World Context
categories.description: Posts on ancient literacy, archaeology, Greco-Roman religion, magic, Roman crucifixion practices, social class, wealth, and the Roman world.

categories.name: Apocalypticism and Revelation
categories.description: Posts on Jewish, Pauline, modern, and Jesus-related apocalypticism, especially the book of Revelation.

categories.name: Authorship
categories.description: Posts on who wrote biblical and early Christian texts, including gospel authorship, Pauline authorship, Luke-Acts, Revelation, secretaries, and attribution.

categories.name: Bart's Books
categories.description: Posts focused on Bart's major books, including Misquoting Jesus, Forged, How Jesus Became God, Jesus Before the Gospels, Heaven and Hell, and The Triumph of Christianity.

categories.name: Blog Features and Personal Posts
categories.description: Posts featuring autobiographical reflections, personal essays, blog fundraising and charities, and the In a Nutshell series.

categories.name: Books, Teaching, and Media
categories.description: Posts on book publishing, textbooks, teaching, public scholarship, lectures, podcasts, interviews, video media, and writing process.

categories.name: Canon and Scripture
categories.description: Posts on canon, biblical inerrancy, contradictions, Christian use of scripture, fulfillment citations, gematria, and moral problems in scripture.

categories.name: Canonical Gospels
categories.description: Posts on Matthew, Mark, Luke, John, gospel writers, gospel authorship, gospel composition, dating, historicity, Q, and the Synoptic Problem.

categories.name: Christology
categories.description: Posts on views of Christ, including early christology, exaltation, incarnation, Christ as an angel, Jesus' divine status, Luke-Acts christology, and the Philippians Christ poem.

categories.name: Early Church History
categories.description: Posts on early Christianity, early Christian writings, Apostolic Fathers, church history, Trinity, Edessa, and major figures such as Athanasius, Augustine, Eusebius, Papias, and Didymus the Blind.

categories.name: Epistles
categories.description: Posts on Pauline letters, General Epistles, Philippians, 2 Thessalonians, epistolary authorship, forgeries, composition, and persecution in the epistles.

categories.name: Ethics and Social Issues
categories.description: Posts on wealth, charity, health care, anti-Judaism, homosexuality, women, moral philosophy, social class, and ethical teachings of Jesus and Paul.

categories.name: Forgery
categories.description: Posts on literary forgery, modern forgeries, Pauline forgeries, Petrine forgeries, General Epistles forgeries, and the Secret Gospel of Mark.

categories.name: Gnosticism and Heresy
categories.description: Posts on Gnosticism, heresy, Marcion, Nag Hammadi, Gospel of Judas, Sethian and Valentinian Gnostics, proto-orthodoxy, and related textual variants.

categories.name: Hebrew Bible and Early Judaism
categories.description: Posts on the Hebrew Bible, early Judaism, Dead Sea Scrolls, Genesis, Job, Ecclesiastes, Pentateuch, Prophets, Jewish Law, and divine beings.

categories.name: Historical Figures and Scholars
categories.description: Posts focused on named ancient figures and modern scholars, including Josephus, Celsus, Marcion, Papias, Eusebius, Bruce Metzger, Athanasius, Augustine, and Constantine.

categories.name: Historical Method and Scholarship
categories.description: Posts on historical method, biblical scholarship, debates, source criticism, redaction criticism, gospel analysis methods, dating texts, research, and public scholarship.

categories.name: Jesus
categories.description: Posts on Jesus as a historical figure, including birth narratives, virgin birth, family, genealogy, miracles, teachings, ethics, wealth, women, Nazareth, Messiah, Son of Man, and apocalyptic Jesus.

categories.name: Jesus' Death, Burial, and Resurrection
categories.description: Posts on Jesus' trial, crucifixion, burial, empty tomb, passion narratives, resurrection appearances, resurrection theology, and resurrection apologetics.

categories.name: Manuscripts and Translations
categories.description: Posts on manuscripts, manuscript discoveries and dating, Codex Sinaiticus, Dead Sea Scrolls, Papyrus Egerton, Bible translations, NRSV, Septuagint, and translation process.

categories.name: Memory and Oral Tradition
categories.description: Posts on memory, oral tradition, eyewitness reliability, and gospel eyewitness claims.

categories.name: Miracles
categories.description: Posts on miracle stories, Jesus' miracles, miracles in Acts, healing and exorcism, visions, magic and amulets, miracle claims, and non-canonical miracle traditions.

categories.name: Modern Faith and Nonbelief
categories.description: Posts on agnosticism, atheism, deconversion, fundamentalism, and suffering as it relates to loss of faith.

categories.name: New Testament Individuals
categories.description: Posts on major New Testament figures, including James the Brother of Jesus, John the Baptist, Judas Iscariot, Mary Magdalene, and Pontius Pilate.

categories.name: Non-Canonical Texts
categories.description: Posts on non-canonical gospels and writings, including Gospel of Thomas, Gospel of Judas, Gospel of Peter, Gospel of Mary, Gospel of Jesus Wife, Didache, Letter of Barnabas, Apocryphal Acts, and Apocalypse of Peter.

categories.name: Paul and Pauline Christianity
categories.description: Posts on Paul, Pauline letters, Paul in Acts, Pauline communities, conversion, ethics, salvation, women, Jewish law, resurrection, crucifixion, authorship, forgeries, and textual criticism.

categories.name: Persecution and Martyrdom
categories.description: Posts on persecution, Roman persecution, martyrdom, apostolic martyrdom, Perpetua, Polycarp, miracles and martyrdom, Paul and persecution, and persecution in the epistles.

categories.name: Salvation and Judgment
categories.description: Posts on salvation, atonement, grace, free will, predestination, divine judgment, eternal punishment, Luke-Acts atonement, and Pauline salvation models.

categories.name: Suffering and Evil
categories.description: Posts on the problem of suffering, biblical views of suffering, disasters, free will and suffering, Job, afterlife and suffering, and suffering tied to loss of faith.

categories.name: Textual Criticism
categories.description: Posts on original text, scribal changes, textual variants, textual criticism methods, patristic evidence, Pauline textual criticism, and textual variants involving Christology, Gnosticism, and the bloody sweat passage.
